briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby HVAC Service Contract Renewal and Additional Funding
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on renewing an HVAC (heating, ventilation, and air conditioning) maintenance contract and approving an additional $579,600, bringing the total estimated contract value to $5,412,750 since 2021.
briefs.action_required: Monitor the council decision if you supply HVAC services to the City of Burnaby.

key_dates.label: Burnaby HVAC contract renewal term begins — 2nd renewal takes effect
Burnaby HVAC contract 2nd renewal term ends
